creator: kirill@drlebedev.com
text:
(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #1)

Thanks for the suggestion. The problem port faces is that mod file is not processed correctly and whole zip is being downloaded from proxy instead of text .mod file. Specific module version did not help. This issue seems to exist after Xray project migrated to Date-based versioning.

Can you explain a value of using Go Proxy instead of direct Github sources? If there is no specific value in it that you are pursuing, I would prefer to switch to build from Github SOT repo.
